audit_lenses: structural (section numbering, leaf counts, duplicate terms)
defect_checks_run: JP-only kanji forms in ZH (false positive: unified codepoints)

findings.description: Section 14-02 EN title inconsistency across consecutive pages: p476='Network Equipment' vs p477='Network Device'. JP ('ネットワーク機器') and ZH ('网络设备') are consistent. EN needs standardization.
findings.recommendation: Standardize EN to 'Network Devices' (preferred) or 'Network Equipment' consistently across both pages.

findings.description: Section p481 '伝送効率と伝送時間' (Transmission Efficiency and Transmission Time) has section_number='14-02', but its topic is completely different from the Network Equipment sections (p476-477) also numbered 14-02. This is almost certainly a section numbering error; p481 should be 14-03 or similar.
findings.recommendation: Correct section_number for p481 from '14-02' to the appropriate sub-section number (e.g., '14-03').

findings.description: ZH definition of ルーター (p477) uses ASCII halfwidth comma ',' ('例如,在连接') instead of standard ZH fullwidth comma '，' (U+FF0C). Also contains spaces around Latin acronyms: 'の LAN 和大阪支社的 LAN'.
findings.recommendation: Replace ',' with '，' (U+FF0C) and remove spaces around embedded LAN/WAN acronyms in ZH definitions.

findings.description: ZH surface fields '有线LAN' and '无线LAN' use bare LAN without Chinese gloss. Standard form would be '有线局域网（LAN）' / '无线局域网（LAN）'. However, '有线LAN'/'无线LAN' are widely accepted hybrid terms in Chinese tech writing. Flagged as INFO only.
findings.recommendation: Consider adding Chinese gloss at first mention: '有线局域网（LAN）' / '无线局域网（LAN）'. Subsequent uses of bare '有线LAN' / '无线LAN' are acceptable.

findings.description: Terms ルーター and デフォルトゲートウェイ appear on both p477 (full definitions) and p478 (condensed exam-style definitions). Definitions are semantically consistent. This appears intentional (full explanation + exam-formula format). No semantic conflict.
findings.recommendation: No action required if dual-format is by design. Consider adding a 'variant_of' or 'see_also' link between the duplicate entries.

clean_checks: No Kana leaked into ZH fields
All trilingual definitions factually accurate (network tech domain)
Duplicate terms ルーター/デフォルトゲートウェイ semantically consistent across p477/p478
5G, PoE, PLC, SDN, ESSID definitions correct in all three languages
Table (p479 Ethernet successor standards) trilingual content accurate
verdict_rationale: 1 ERROR (wrong section_number on p481), 2 WARN (EN title inconsistency 14-02, halfwidth comma in ZH p477). No U+FFFD, no kana leakage, no concept errors. Content quality is high.
